title: hieracium commersonii var. genuinum
intro: Hieracium commersonii var. genuinum is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It is also known as a type of hawkweed, a plant traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and it is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving pain. Hieracium commersonii var. genuinum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and it is often used in herbal remedies to support immune function and reduce inflammation.
